title: Take a Seat
description: This is a small datapack that allows you to sit on blocks. Use "/trigger sit" to to sit. Press sneak key to stand back up.
body:
# Description
This is a small datapack that allows you to sit on blocks. Use `/trigger sit` to to sit. Press sneak key to stand back up.

# Optional Advancment Guides
To enable a list with guides for my datapacks, use `/advancement grant <targets> from dragon3025:root`.
